commit_scope: Add a Form-native coding-act receipt floor so source listening, patch speaking, verifier feedback, and learned trust deltas become one self-teaching code loop.

commands.command: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/tool-channel.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/code-tool-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/code-tool-learning-band.fk
commands.output: core.fk+nearest-shape.fk+classifier-eval.fk+tool-channel.fk+choice-receipt.fk+branch-choice-order.fk+choice-receipt-learning.fk+oracle-catalog.fk+code-tool-learning.fk+code-tool-learning-band.fk -> 262143; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way; 1 ok, 0 divergent.

ci_validation.notes: CI not run yet in this local evidence record.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy performed by this branch.

phase_gate.reason: Focused Form proof passed locally; PR/CI and deploy freshness remain pending after push.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/code-tool-learning.fk -> coding-act receipt constructors and gates

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Code-tool-learning can now represent a complete coding act as a native self-teaching receipt: listened source surface, spoken Form patch recipe, verifier receipts, choice receipt, and accepted trust delta.
public_endpoints: not-applicable: local Form stdlib proof only
test_flows: The original code generation, tool-selection, proof-execution, A/B choice, oracle-evidence, and lowering-path arms still pass.
A coding-act row validates nonempty source kind/language/path/source signature/node signature/grammar.
A patch recipe validates nonempty intent/dialect/signature, positive touched file count, and reversible=1.
Verifier rows require pass status, nonzero duration, names, and evidence signatures.
A learned delta is accepted only when sample count is positive and trust-after exceeds trust-before.
The new coding-act arm raises the band from 131071 to 262143 four-way.
